create.title: Create a household
create.description: Set up a shared household. You'll become its owner.

onboarding.title: Welcome to HomeOps
onboarding.description: Create your first household to start tracking obligations, expenses and documents together.

settings.title: Household
settings.description: Manage your household, members and invitations.

general.archiveDescription: Archiving hides this household for everyone. This cannot be easily undone.
general.archiveConfirmDescription: All members will lose access. Type to confirm.

members.title: Members
members.removeConfirmDescription: They will lose access to this household.
members.leaveConfirmDescription: You will lose access to this household.

accept.title: Join household
accept.previewDescription: You've been invited to join {{household}} as {{role}}.
accept.signInPrompt: Sign in or register with {{email}} to accept this invitation.
accept.wrongAccount: This invitation was sent to {{email}}. Sign in with that address to accept.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.conflict: That action isn't allowed right now (e.g. the last owner, or an existing member/invite).
errors.lastOwner: You can't remove or demote the last owner.
errors.alreadyMember: That person is already a member.
errors.pendingInvite: There's already a pending invitation for that email.
errors.invalidInvite: This invitation is invalid or has expired.
errors.emailMismatch: This invitation was issued to a different email address.
